# Lab 10.6 – Final CSP Report

## Objective

The objective of this laboratory is to summarize the complete Common Spatial Patterns (CSP) processing pipeline and present the final dataset prepared for machine learning classification.

---

## Completed Laboratories

- Lab10.1 – CSP Theory
- Lab10.2 – Train CSP
- Lab10.3 – Transform EEG Signals
- Lab10.4 – CSP Feature Analysis
- Lab10.5 – Save CSP Features

---

## Generated Files

### CSP Model

```
csp/csp_model.pkl
```

### CSP Features

```
csp/csp_features.csv
```

### Final Dataset

```
csp/csp_dataset.csv
```

### Reports

```
results/lab10_01_csp_theory_report.txt
results/lab10_02_train_csp_report.txt
results/lab10_03_transform_eeg_signals_report.txt
results/lab10_04_csp_feature_analysis_report.txt
results/lab10_05_save_csp_features_report.txt
results/lab10_06_csp_report.txt
```

---

## Summary

The CSP pipeline successfully transformed the processed EEG epochs into a compact spatial feature representation suitable for machine learning.

The generated dataset has been validated and saved for the next chapter.

---

## Conclusion

Chapter 10 successfully completed the spatial feature extraction stage using Common Spatial Patterns.

The project is now ready to proceed to **Chapter 11 – Machine Learning Classification**, where the CSP dataset will be used to train and evaluate multiple classification models.
